component.name: Pinba Engine
component.summary: MySQL storage engine for PHP runtime statistics

description.p: Pinba is a MySQL storage engine that collects and processes PHP runtime statistics sent over UDP by the Pinba PHP extension. It provides real-time per-script performance monitoring without any additional infrastructure.
This fork adds support for MySQL 8.0 and MySQL 8.4, continuing the original project by Antony Dovgal.
